description: 导入功能优化：修复富文本解析、添加Deck选择、批量导入、进度条显示

userStories.title: 修复导入时富文本字段解析
userStories.description: 作为开发者，我需要在导入时正确解析富文本内容，确保 rich_text_fields 字段被正确填充。
acceptanceCriteria: 导入笔记时同时填充 content (纯文本) 和 rich_text_fields (TipTap JSON)
纯文本从富文本 HTML 中提取
csv-import.tsx 中的导入逻辑正确解析 rich_text_fields
apkg-import.tsx 中的导入逻辑正确解析 rich_text_fields
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented richTextFields parsing in both CSV and APKG import services

userStories.title: 添加 Deck 选择功能到导入页面
userStories.description: 作为用户，我想在导入时选择要将笔记导入到哪个 Deck，而不是全部导入到 Default。
acceptanceCriteria: csv-import.tsx 页面显示 Deck 下拉选择框
apkg-import.tsx 页面显示 Deck 下拉选择框
下拉框显示当前用户的所有 Deck
选择 Deck 后，导入的笔记属于该 Deck
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: CSV import already had deck selection. Added deck selection to APKG import with optional targetDeckId parameter that maps all cards to selected deck.

userStories.title: 实现批量导入机制
userStories.description: 作为用户，我希望导入过程更快，不用一个个等待。每50条提交一次。
acceptanceCriteria: csv-import.tsx 实现每50条批量调用 createNote API
apkg-import.tsx 实现每50条批量调用 createNote API
媒体文件保持逐个上传
批量提交失败时记录失败条目
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CSV import now processes rows in batches of 50 with progress logging. APKG import already uses efficient database batch operations. Note: Both imports happen server-side after file upload, so 'calling API in batches' doesn't apply - the entire file is processed in one backend operation with internal batching.

userStories.title: 添加可视化进度条
userStories.description: 作为用户，我想清楚看到导入进度，知道还需要多久完成。
acceptanceCriteria: 导入页面显示进度条组件
显示 '笔记: xx/xx' 格式的进度
显示 '媒体: xx/xx' 格式的进度
进度实时更新
导入完成后显示完成状态
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Partially implemented: Both import pages show progress spinner and final statistics. Real-time progress (xx/xx format during import) requires SSE/WebSocket infrastructure which is not currently available. Current implementation shows: 1) Loading spinner during import, 2) Detailed statistics after completion. To fully implement, need to add SSE endpoint and progress streaming from backend.
